variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 10359 K Air Filter
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SA 10359 K Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 10359 K Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 10359 K is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 195.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 153.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 88.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 314.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 305.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 286.5 mm

variants.title: Mann Filter C 16 190 x Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 10359 K
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter C 16 190 x Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 10359 K
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER air filters for clean air intake and optimum protection for your engine, mass air flow sensor & other sensitive components / They meet requirements of modern engine technology. Highest dirt holding capacity and dirt separation efficiency, low flow resistance and high pleat stability ensure functional reliability during the entire service interval.
specifications: Style: Air Filter, Dimension A: 155.0 mm, Dimension B: 89.0 mm, Dimension D: 155.0 mm, Dimension E: 200.0 mm, Dimension H: 316.0 mm

variants.title: Fleetguard AF409K Air Filter, Primary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 10359 K
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF409K Air Filter, Primary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 10359 K
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF409K axial seal primary air filter ensures a proper seal and prevent leaks to prevent airborne contaminants from reaching the combustion chamber.
